data.title: Write RED failing unit tests for scripts/release.sh precondition logic
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-release.sh using the PATH-injection mocking pattern established in test-tag-release.sh. A make_mock() helper creates stub binaries in $MOCK_BIN (prepended to PATH) to control git, gh, and validate.sh outputs. Tests MUST FAIL (RED) because scripts/release.sh does not yet exist.

## Files to Create
- tests/scripts/test-release.sh

## Test Cases (Given/When/Then)
All tests: Given mocked precondition failure/pass, When scripts/release.sh VERSION is called, Then exits with expected code and named precondition in stderr.

1. test_release_ci_not_green: Given mock gh returns CI failure status, Then exits non-zero with "CI" in stderr
2. test_release_dirty_tree: Given mock git status --porcelain returns dirty output, Then exits non-zero with "working tree" in stderr
3. test_release_not_on_main: Given mock git branch --show-current returns "feature-x", Then exits non-zero with "main" in stderr
4. test_release_not_up_to_date: Given mock git status shows behind origin, Then exits non-zero with "up-to-date" in stderr
5. test_release_validate_fails: Given mock .claude/scripts/dso exits non-zero for validate.sh --ci, Then exits non-zero with "validate" in stderr
6. test_release_invalid_json: Given .claude-plugin/marketplace.json would be invalid JSON, Then exits non-zero
7. test_release_confirmation_required: Given no --yes flag and stdin=/dev/null, Then mock git push stub records it was NOT called (exit 1 from release.sh)
8. test_release_yes_flag_accepted: Given --yes flag and all mocked preconditions passing, Then exits 0 and mock push stub was called exactly once
9. test_release_all_preconditions_pass: Given all preconditions mocked as passing + --yes, Then exits 0 (happy path)

## RED Marker
.test-index updated with [test_release_ci_not_green] for scripts/release.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-release.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-release.sh
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_release_ci_not_green] for scripts/release.sh
  Verify: grep '\[test_release_ci_not_green\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test file has valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-release.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL when run without scripts/release.sh present (RED phase confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh; test $? -ne 0
